'''âs-n-h''' ('''kasanah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:limelight|limelight]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:limelight|limelight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-n-h
|-
! Lemma
| kasanah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisanah|thisanah]] || [[word:jisanah|jisanah]] || [[word:shisanah|shisanah]] || [[word:kisanah|kisanah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusanah|thuthusanah]] || [[word:jujusanah|jujusanah]] || [[word:shushusanah|shushusanah]] || [[word:kukusanah|kukusanah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusanah|thusanah]] || [[word:jusanah|jusanah]] || [[word:shusanah|shusanah]] || [[word:kusanah|kusanah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusanah|thusanah]] || [[word:jusanah|jusanah]] || [[word:shusanah|shusanah]] || [[word:kusanah|kusanah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesanah|thesanah]] || [[word:jesanah|jesanah]] || [[word:shesanah|shesanah]] || [[word:kesanah|kesanah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosanah|thothosanah]] || [[word:jojosanah|jojosanah]] || [[word:shoshosanah|shoshosanah]] || [[word:kokosanah|kokosanah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosanah|thosanah]] || [[word:josanah|josanah]] || [[word:shosanah|shosanah]] || [[word:kosanah|kosanah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosanah|thosanah]] || [[word:josanah|josanah]] || [[word:shosanah|shosanah]] || [[word:kosanah|kosanah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsanah|thĂŠsanah]] || [[word:jĂŠsanah|jĂŠsanah]] || [[word:shĂŠsanah|shĂŠsanah]] || [[word:kĂŠsanah|kĂŠsanah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasanah|thathasanah]] || [[word:jajasanah|jajasanah]] || [[word:shashasanah|shashasanah]] || [[word:kakasanah|kakasanah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasanah|thasanah]] || [[word:jasanah|jasanah]] || [[word:shasanah|shasanah]] || [[word:kasanah|kasanah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasanah|thasanah]] || [[word:jasanah|jasanah]] || [[word:shasanah|shasanah]] || [[word:kasanah|kasanah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasanah|shasanah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasanah|goshasanah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasanah|gokishasanah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasanahnĂŒ|shasanahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasanahnknĂŒ|goshasanahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasanahnĂŒ|gokishasanahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasanahshĂ«|shasanahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasanahnkshĂ«|goshasanahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasanahshĂ«|gokishasanahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasanahro|shasanahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasanahnkro|goshasanahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasanahro|gokishasanahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasanahmu|shasanahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasanahnkmu|goshasanahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasanahmu|gokishasanahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasanahsher|shasanahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasanahnksher|goshasanahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasanahsher|gokishasanahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasanahng|shasanahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasanahnkng|goshasanahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasanahng|gokishasanahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasanahya|shasanahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasanahnkya|goshasanahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasanahya|gokishasanahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasanahyam|shasanahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasanahnkyam|goshasanahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasanahyam|gokishasanahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasanahnĂŒshĂ«|shasanahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasanahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasanahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasanahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasanahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasanahnĂŒro|shasanahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasanahnknĂŒro|goshasanahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasanahnĂŒro|gokishasanahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasanahnĂŒmu|shasanahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasanahnknĂŒmu|goshasanahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasanahnĂŒmu|gokishasanahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasanahshĂ«nĂŒ|shasanahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasanahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasanahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasanahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasanahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasanahshĂ«ro|shasanahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasanahnkshĂ«ro|goshasanahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasanahshĂ«ro|gokishasanahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasanahshĂ«mu|shasanahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasanahnkshĂ«mu|goshasanahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasanahshĂ«mu|gokishasanahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasanahronĂŒ|shasanahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasanahnkronĂŒ|goshasanahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasanahronĂŒ|gokishasanahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasanahroshĂ«|shasanahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasanahnkroshĂ«|goshasanahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasanahroshĂ«|gokishasanahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasanahromu|shasanahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasanahnkromu|goshasanahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasanahromu|gokishasanahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasanahmunĂŒ|shasanahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasanahnkmunĂŒ|goshasanahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasanahmunĂŒ|gokishasanahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasanahmushĂ«|shasanahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasanahnkmushĂ«|goshasanahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasanahmushĂ«|gokishasanahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasanahmuro|shasanahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasanahnkmuro|goshasanahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasanahmuro|gokishasanahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
